assertions.text: Sets isAccessibilityElement = false on the container (it's a container, not an element)
assertions.rationale: Skill's UIAccessibilityElement pattern for custom drawing

assertions.text: Overrides accessibilityElements to return UIAccessibilityElement array
assertions.rationale: Skill's complete pattern with UIAccessibilityElement for each data point
Skill's pattern includes coordinate conversion for correct hit testing

assertions.text: Each element has accessibilityLabel and accessibilityValue
assertions.rationale: WITHOUT often provides only container label; WITH gives per-element access
